report.summary: Standup v8 Apr 3: BTC reversal to ~$66,868 (-2.7% from v7's $68,743), ETH $2,055 (flat). F&G at 9 — Extreme Fear day 8 (sub-10 historically rare). Since v7: community-v3 + eod-v5 ran. Crypto market -2.4% to $2.38T. MARA layoffs 15%, X requiring ID for crypto posts. 25 agent runs today = ~$1,800 human-equiv. Deploy debt 17th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v7 → v8): BTC relief rally reversed — price dropped from $68,743 to ~$66,868 (-2.7%). The bounce driven by Iran peace signals and March jobs data has faded. ETH roughly flat at $2,055 vs v7's $2,038 (+0.8%). Overall crypto market cap down 2.4% to $2.38T with $105B 24h volume.

F&G INDEX DETERIORATION: Dropped to 9 from v7's 8-12 range — now firmly in single digits. This is Extreme Fear day 8. Sub-10 readings have occurred fewer than 20 times in crypto history (COVID crash 2020, China mining ban 2021, Terra/3AC contagion 2022). Our DCA Calculator and Fear & Greed tool pages at maximum relevance — IF they were deployed.

BTC ETF FLOWS: Q1 closed with ~$500M net outflows, but March alone saw +$1.32B inflows showing institutional stabilization. Early April data mixed — single-day outflows of $171M-$272M amid risk-off sentiment. Corporate BTC treasuries at record >1.1M BTC (5-6% of supply).

CRYPTO NEWS CYCLE: MARA laid off 15% of employees (pivoting to energy/digital infrastructure). X (Twitter) now locking accounts posting crypto content for first time + requiring identity verification — potential chilling effect on crypto social engagement. Sonic Labs destroying 32.69M unclaimed S tokens after Oct 15. Stablecoin supply still at $316B ATH.
CONTENT ON DISK: 311 learn page dirs in cryptodegen workspace. 78 in Degen0x workspace. No new pages built since v7. All accumulated content remains uncommitted and invisible to Google.
SINCE v7: community-v3 agent ran (06:48 UTC) — additional social content drafted. eod-v5 agent ran (06:53 UTC) — QA cycle-close pass. No build or design agents this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v7 → v8): 2 agent runs — community-v3 (social content drafts) + eod-v5 (QA pass). No build, design, or deploy agents ran. Standup v8 = this cycle.

TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 25 runs across 5 types — standup×8 ($360), build×3 ($699), design×3 ($180), community×6 ($246), eod×5 ($315). Total human-equiv: $1,800. Publish-deploy agent: 0 runs today.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (17TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt continues growing. BTC just reversed its relief rally, market fear deepening to F&G 9. Search demand for 'should I sell bitcoin' and 'crypto crash 2026' spiking. Our fear & greed, DCA calculator, staking, and 311+ learn pages sit uncommitted. Every hour without deploying = organic traffic permanently lost. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P0 — X CRYPTO IDENTITY POLICY: X now requiring identity verification for crypto posts + locking first-time crypto posters. This could significantly impact our social distribution strategy (429 tweets drafted, none posted via official channels). Community manager needs guidance on alternative distribution: Farcaster, Lens, Bluesky, Discord/Telegram amplification.
P1 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 111 slugs in published-pages.ts with no page.tsx on disk. Will 404 if deployed as-is. Needs cleanup before next deploy.
P2 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 4/6 routes with no fallback data. Unchanged 17+ cycles.
P3 — 141 TS ERRORS: In structured-data.examples.ts + 3 learn pages. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Fix before next deploy for cleaner builds.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 17TH ESCALATION): F&G at 9 = once-in-a-year search demand window. 311 learn pages, tools, and guides sitting in limbo. BTC reversing its bounce means fear searches intensifying — 'crypto crash', 'should I sell', 'DCA strategy' all trending. One git commit + Vercel push = $0 cost, unlocks weeks of content. This is the single highest-ROI action available. JEFE MUST ACT.

PRIORITY 2 — ADAPT SOCIAL STRATEGY FOR X RESTRICTIONS: X's new identity verification + account locking for crypto content is a material distribution risk. 429 drafted tweets may face friction on X. Action items: (a) evaluate Farcaster/Lens/Bluesky as primary crypto social channels, (b) prioritize Discord/Telegram community building, (c) update community skill with multi-platform publishing workflow. Early movers to decentralized social during X restrictions will capture displaced audience.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR CONTENT BLITZ: With F&G at 9 (historically bottom-signal territory), create urgency-driven content: 'Crypto Fear Index Hits 9 — What Happens Next?' guide, 'Bitcoin Crash Survival Guide 2026', 'Best DCA Strategy During Extreme Fear'. These exact queries are being searched NOW. Build + deploy in same cycle for maximum impact.
